nasb.text: but whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit never has forgiveness, but is guilty of an eternal sin”—

esv.text: but whoever blasphemes against the Holy Spirit never has forgiveness, but is guilty of an eternal sin”—

cnv.text: 但褻瀆聖靈的，就永世不得赦免，他還要擔當罪惡到永遠。”

ccb.text: 唯有亵渎圣灵的人永远得不到赦免，他们要永远担罪。”

csbs.text: 但如果有人亵渎圣灵，他永远得不到赦免，而且必担当永远的罪。”
